steps.title: Match realism with tradition
steps.content: The underlined claim says The Grass Dancer resembles magical realist novels by juxtaposing literary realism with long-established Dakota cultural traditions. The supporting quotation must show both realistic fiction and Dakota elements that move beyond realism.

steps.title: Avoid distorted comparisons
steps.content: Choice A wrongly places Dakota traditions within Latin American magical realism. Choice C says the traditions remain constant but does not clearly support the realism-tradition juxtaposition. Choice D frames Dakota traditions and magical realism as competing influences. The quotation about realistic conventions plus Dakota elements that transcend realism supports the claim. The answer is B.
